error_status_fallback: The request could not be completed.
landing_meta_title: Discover stores and reserve at your mall | MallHub
landing_meta_description: Explore stores, compare products, take advantage of active deals and secure your purchase with Pick & Collect and QR code on MallHub.
landing_hero_subtitle: Explore stores, compare products, take advantage of active deals and secure your purchase with Pick & Collect and QR code.
landing_campaigns_subtitle: Active promotions from brands and stores running inside MallHub.
landing_problem_subtitle: Too much time searching, too much friction buying. MallHub simplifies the experience.
landing_problem_buyer_before: Walking around the mall hoping to find what you need.
landing_problem_buyer_after: Search from your phone and know exactly where to find it.
landing_problem_store_before: Catalog, reservations, and promotions managed manually and scattered.
landing_problem_store_after: Everything centralized in a single digital workflow.
landing_steps_subtitle: Three steps to a friction-free purchase.
landing_steps_1_desc: Find products and stores at your favorite mall.
landing_steps_2_desc: Pick what you like and reserve for pickup.
landing_steps_3_desc: Show your QR code at the store and you're done. No lines.
landing_buyers_subtitle: Everything you need for a faster, more convenient shopping experience.
landing_buyers_discovery_desc: Find exactly what you're looking for across hundreds of stores and products at your mall.
landing_buyers_offers_desc: Access active promotions from your favorite stores, organized by mall.
landing_buyers_pickup_desc: Reserve and pick up with your QR code. No waiting, no hassle.
landing_business_subtitle: Tools to digitize and optimize store and mall management.
landing_features_title: Everything you need, in one place
landing_features_subtitle: Features designed for every player in the commercial ecosystem.
landing_features_search_desc: Find products, stores, and promotions with smart filters.
landing_features_promos_desc: Active deals organized by mall and store.
landing_features_pickup_desc: Reserve online and pick up in-store with a QR code.
landing_features_store_desc: Manage catalog, promotions, and reservations from one place.
landing_features_insights_desc: Commercial activity visibility and basic reports.
landing_features_navigation_desc: Browse malls, stores, and products with ease.
landing_trust_subtitle: Built with the highest standards of protection and accessibility.
landing_trust_privacy_desc: Responsible personal data handling with protection standards.
landing_trust_payments_desc: Certified payment gateways. We never store card data.
landing_trust_accessibility_desc: Designed to accessibility standards for an inclusive experience.
landing_faq_1_q: Do I need to sign up to use MallHub?
landing_faq_1_a: You can browse stores and products as a guest. To reserve with Pick & Collect you need a free account.
landing_faq_2_q: Does MallHub cost anything for shoppers?
landing_faq_2_a: MallHub is completely free for shoppers. Stores and malls access plans based on their needs.
landing_faq_3_q: Which shopping malls is it available in?
landing_faq_3_a: We're constantly growing. Check the app to see active malls in your city.
landing_faq_4_q: How long does reservation confirmation take?
landing_faq_4_a: Confirmation is nearly instant. You'll receive your QR code within minutes of completing your reservation.
landing_faq_5_a: You can reach us through the app or by email. Our team is ready to help.
landing_cta_subtitle: Join thousands of shoppers already enjoying a smarter shopping experience.
auth_brand_subtitle: Discover stores, products and promotions in one place.
auth_feature_stores_desc: Browse hundreds of stores in one place.
auth_feature_pickup_desc: Reserve with QR and skip the queue.
